Motion For Order To Compel The Further Responses Of Defendant Jason Perkins To Plaintiff Loanvest Is First Set Of Requests For Admission, Second Document Request, First Set Of Form Interrogatories, And Second Set Of Specially Prepared Interrogatories, To Compel Defendants Production Of Documents Responsive To Second Document Request, is granted in part and denied in part.
